comment.body:
Ya super funky price action and I am with you.  Also super impacted by admin tweets. It is like they want to have the cake and eat it too. Admin cannot tolerate a falling market since they want to inflate away the debt and he will not allow a fall before midterms. At the same time they poked china and did not count on the counter measures being launched from the other side :) 

Something is definitely fishy under the surface and the most speculative stocks are rising ( Quantum, Nuclear, Rare earths) while Mag and AI are falling.
